PreToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "^(docker|make|pnpm dev|npm run dev|yarn dev|bun run dev)"

hooks.command: node -e "if(!process.env.TMUX){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: docker/make must run in tmux for log access');console.error('[Hook] Use: tmux new-session -d -s dev \"<command>\"');console.error('[Hook] Then: tmux attach -t dev');process.exit(1)}else{let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(d))}"
osascript -e 'display notification "A subagent has finished its task" with title "🤖 Claude Agent Complete"'
jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' | xargs -I {} osascript -e 'display notification "Tool: {}" with title "🔒 Claude Permission Required"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input to continue" with title "💬 Claude Input Required"'

node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path;if(p&&fs.existsSync(p)){try{const r=execSync('ruff check "'+p+'" 2>&1',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']});if(r.trim()){console.error('[Hook] Ruff issues in '+p+':');console.error(r.split('
').slice(0,10).join('
'))}}catch(e){const out=(e.stdout||e.stderr||'').trim();if(out){console.error('[Hook] Ruff issues in '+p+':');console.error(out.split('
').slice(0,10).join('
'))}}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(npm run build|pnpm build|yarn build)"

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{console.error('[Hook] Build completed - async analysis running in background');console.log(d)})"

node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path;if(p&&fs.existsSync(p)){let dir=path.dirname(p);while(dir!==path.dirname(dir)&&!fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'tsconfig.json'))){dir=path.dirname(dir)}if(fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'tsconfig.json'))){try{const r=execSync('npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1',{cwd:dir,encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']});const lines=r.split('
').filter(l=>l.includes(p)).slice(0,10);if(lines.length)console.error(lines.join('
'))}catch(e){const lines=(e.stdout||'').split('
').filter(l=>l.includes(p)).slice(0,10);if(lines.length)console.error(lines.join('
'))}}}console.log(d)})"

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); dir=$(basename "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')"); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); branch=$(cd "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" 2>/dev/null && git -c core.fileMode=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); printf "\033[96m%s\033[0m \033[90m|\033[0m \033[95m%s\033[0m" "$model" "$dir"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf " \033[90m|\033[0m \033[93m%s\033[0m" "$branch"; if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then r=$(printf "%.0f" "$remaining"); if [ "$r" -gt 50 ]; then c="\033[92m"; elif [ "$r" -gt 25 ]; then c="\033[93m"; else c="\033[91m"; fi; printf " \033[90m|\033[0m ${c}ctx: %s%%\033[0m" "$r"; fi; echo
